title: Comment from Connecting for Better Health, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: The Connecting for Better Health coalition appreciates your leadership in advancing interoperability through the ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions to Unleash Prosperity (HTI-5) Proposed Rule. We value the opportunity to provide public comment informed by the broad-based expertise of our coalition. Please find our public comments attached for your consideration.
